summary: UI Changes tested successfully: (1) Feed filter labels renamed to All/Now Spinning/Haul/ISO/Sale-Trade/Note/New Feature with honey #FFB800 active state. (2) PostTypeBadge NOTE shows 'Note' not 'Album Note'. (3) BLOCK 379: Daily Prompt buzz count at top-right, archive link centered below with arrow.
critical_code_review_comments: HivePage.js line 444-452: FEED_FILTERS array has correct labels (All, Now Spinning, Haul, ISO, Sale/Trade, Note, New Feature)
HivePage.js line 774-799: Filter bar uses flex-wrap gap-2 with inline styles for honey active state (#FFB800) and cream border inactive
PostCards.js line 116-126: NOTE type correctly renders 'Note' label (not 'Album Note') with BookOpen icon
DailyPrompt.js line 88-95: 'DAILY PROMPT' label and buzz-count-top on same row using flex justify-between
DailyPrompt.js line 198-206: Archive link centered using text-center div with arrow (→)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Three UI changes verified: (1) Feed filters renamed with honey active/cream inactive styling and mobile pill wrapping. (2) PostTypeBadge NOTE shows 'Note'. (3) BLOCK 379 - Daily Prompt card has buzz count top-right and archive link centered below content.

feed_filter_labels.details: All 7 filters present: All, Now Spinning, Haul, ISO, Sale/Trade, Note, New Feature

active_filter_honey_styling.details: Active filter (All) has background #FFB800 with black text

inactive_filter_styling.details: Inactive filters have transparent background with cream border rgba(200,134,26,0.3)

mobile_filter_wrapping.details: Filter bar uses flex-wrap: wrap; pills wrap to 2 rows on 375px width (height 64px)

note_badge_label.details: PostTypeBadge for NOTE type shows 'Note' (not 'Album Note')

daily_prompt_buzz_count_top.details: Buzz count visible at top-right of Daily Prompt card (data-testid='buzz-count-top')

archive_link_centered.details: Archive link centered below prompt content (offset 0px from center)

archive_link_arrow.details: Archive link shows 'See what the Hive said yesterday →' with arrow

feed_loads_correctly.details: Feed loads posts without errors, regression check passed

mocked_api_note: Streaming links (Spotify/Apple Music) are MOCKED with search URL placeholders. Resend email is MOCKED.
